currentStep.title: Find the Missing Factor for a Square
currentStep.openingLine: Let's look for the one missing factor that would make every prime count even.
currentStep.firstTutorQuestion: Which prime factor count is odd right now and needs one more?
currentStep.smallHint: Square numbers need each prime factor to appear an even number of times.
currentStep.goodStoppingPoint: Learner identifies the missing factor and explains why it completes the square structure.
